effect.subject: callout_style
effect.reserved_for: one style per screen/section — never two of the same style competing

rule_text: There are three approved callout styles (main callout, secondary/data callout, text-heavy callout). Use them judiciously; never place two of the same callout style competing on one screen or section.
intent: Prevent visual competition and preserve callout hierarchy.
summary: Use three callout styles (main, secondary/data, text-heavy); never place two identical callouts competing on one screen or section.
